assumptions: Mock India site selection uses seeded cluster scoring rather than full geospatial analysis.

Property Engine v1 uses cited product-profile values first, then benchmark public seeds, then optional library-backed calculations, then analogy, then block.
Library-backed values are treated as estimated unless a cited source also anchors the property basis.
Binary interaction parameters are only used when a cited/public source adapter resolves the specific pair; otherwise the solver falls back to ideal gamma=1.0.

Henry-law constants and solubility curves are only used when the property engine resolves a cited/public basis for the active pair; otherwise separators fall back to heuristic splits with explicit warnings.

control_loops.objective: Maintain reactor temperature within the conversion/selectivity window.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Reaction heat release, feed-ratio drift, and utility temperature fluctuations.
control_loops.startup_logic: Ramp utility service first, then introduce feed under low-rate permissive until reactor temperature stabilizes.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Isolate feeds, hold cooling/inerting until the reactor contents fall below the safe residual-temperature limit.
control_loops.override_logic: High-high temperature override closes feed and drives maximum cooling / quench response.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Feeds reactor runaway protection, utility permissives, and emergency feed isolation logic.
control_loops.notes: Protects conversion and selectivity while limiting thermal upset.

control_loops.objective: Keep the reactor inside the design-pressure and phase-stability envelope.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Gas evolution, condenser instability, and downstream restriction changes.
control_loops.startup_logic: Hold reactor on pressure trim while vent / recycle path is proven open before feed escalation.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Depressure through the controlled path after feed isolation and maintain inert purge if required.
control_loops.override_logic: High-pressure override opens relief / vent control path and blocks further feed increase.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Supports relief sizing assumptions, pressure alarms, and shutdown permissives.

control_loops.controlled_variable: Tubular Plug Flow Hydrator feed ratio
control_loops.objective: Maintain stoichiometric or dilution ratio through startup and steady operation.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Upstream feed composition change and pump-speed drift.
control_loops.startup_logic: Keep secondary feed on ratio-follow mode to the lead feed until circulation and temperature are stable.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Drive secondary feed closed first, then ramp down the lead feed to avoid off-ratio inventory.
control_loops.override_logic: High-reactor-temperature or low-circulation permissive forces low-feed bias and ratio hold.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Links throughput control to reactor temperature and pressure safeguard logic.
control_loops.notes: Maintains feed ratio and protects reactor selectivity assumptions.

control_loops.objective: Maintain bottoms inventory and protect internals from flooding or dry operation.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Feed swings, vapor-rate changes, and downstream withdrawal interruptions.
control_loops.startup_logic: Establish reflux / circulation first, then release bottoms under minimum-level permissive.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Reduce feed, maintain reflux / boil-up as needed, and drain to the safe low-level setpoint.
control_loops.override_logic: High-high level overrides bottoms withdrawal or feed cutback depending on service family.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Protects internals, reboiler circulation, and downstream product-quality stability.
control_loops.notes: Protects internals and downstream product quality.

control_loops.objective: Hold the main separation unit on its target pressure / vacuum basis.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Condenser duty swings, vent-load changes, and upstream composition disturbance.
control_loops.startup_logic: Pull pressure into band before advancing feed and enabling automatic reflux or solvent circulation.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Unload feed, keep pressure control active during rundown, then isolate to safe ambient / inert condition.
control_loops.override_logic: Low-pressure / high-pressure override biases vent or condenser duty to prevent air ingress or overpressure.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Feeds column pressure alarms, vacuum protection, and offgas routing logic.
control_loops.notes: Maintains pressure envelope for distillation, absorption, or other main process-unit service.

control_loops.controlled_variable: Distillation and purification train quality driver
control_loops.sensor: Flow transmitter with composition or ratio bias
control_loops.objective: Hold the separation-driving flow that protects product quality and capture/yield targets.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Feed flow/composition variation and utility availability changes.
control_loops.startup_logic: Run on minimum stable recycle/reflux, then close quality target once pressure and inventory loops settle.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Return manipulated flow to rundown minimum before stopping duty or feed sources.
control_loops.override_logic: Analyzer or high-differential-pressure override trims reflux / solvent / circulation to a safe fallback value.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Ties separation quality control to utility duty, flooding risk, and off-spec prevention.
control_loops.notes: Covers reflux control, solvent-rate control, or circulation control depending on selected process-unit family.

control_loops.controlled_variable: Ethylene Glycol storage via vertical tank farm level
control_loops.objective: Prevent overflow and dry-running while maintaining dispatch-ready inventory.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Filling / dispatch mismatch and restart buffer drawdown.
control_loops.startup_logic: Keep dispatch permissive blocked until minimum operating inventory is restored.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Stop transfer on low-low level and retain restart inventory if the plant is entering outage mode.
control_loops.override_logic: High-high level override stops filling and opens alternate routing if configured.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Supports storage overflow protection and working-inventory assumptions.

control_loops.controlled_variable: Ethylene Glycol storage via vertical tank farm blanketing pressure
control_loops.objective: Maintain safe storage pressure and inert atmosphere for inventory handling.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Ambient temperature swing, filling surge, and dispatch withdrawal.
control_loops.startup_logic: Establish blanketing pressure before opening transfer inlets or outlets.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Maintain minimum blanketing setpoint through static storage and isolation.
control_loops.override_logic: High-pressure / low-pressure override trims venting or nitrogen make-up ahead of tank relief action.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Links storage pressure control to inerting and vent-protection assumptions.
control_loops.notes: Maintains tank blanketing and breathing protection.

control_loops.controlled_variable: R-rough to D-rough heat recovery HTM expansion and inventory hold-up level
control_loops.objective: Prevent overflow and dry-running while maintaining dispatch-ready inventory.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Filling / dispatch mismatch and restart buffer drawdown.
control_loops.startup_logic: Keep dispatch permissive blocked until minimum operating inventory is restored.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Stop transfer on low-low level and retain restart inventory if the plant is entering outage mode.
control_loops.override_logic: High-high level override stops filling and opens alternate routing if configured.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Supports storage overflow protection and working-inventory assumptions.

control_loops.controlled_variable: R-rough to D-rough heat recovery HTM expansion and inventory hold-up blanketing pressure
control_loops.objective: Maintain safe storage pressure and inert atmosphere for inventory handling.
control_loops.disturbance_basis: Ambient temperature swing, filling surge, and dispatch withdrawal.
control_loops.startup_logic: Establish blanketing pressure before opening transfer inlets or outlets.
control_loops.shutdown_logic: Maintain minimum blanketing setpoint through static storage and isolation.
control_loops.override_logic: High-pressure / low-pressure override trims venting or nitrogen make-up ahead of tank relief action.
control_loops.safeguard_linkage: Links storage pressure control to inerting and vent-protection assumptions.
control_loops.notes: Maintains tank blanketing and breathing protection.

markdown: The deterministic control plan derives 10 loops from 13 major equipment items and 6 utility services. Loops are attached to thermal, pressure, level, feed-stability, startup/shutdown, and override risks rather than generated as generic instrumentation text.
